sections.paragraph: an unused quadriliteral, i.q. זָעַף to be hot, the letter לְ being inserted, compare Lehrg. p. 864. Other etymological attempts, especially those brought out by Eichhorn in his edition of Simonis’ Lexicon, resting on false significations attributed to Arabic words, I have examined and refuted in Ephemerid. Litt. Hal. 1820, No. 123. Hence-
